name.value: Summit Green Valley Chiangmai Country Club

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: Morning rate including green fee, golf cart and caddy. Afternoon/night rate is 1,900 THB. No weekday/weekend price distinction.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: Same as weekday. Afternoon rate 1,900 THB.

caddie_fee_thb.note: Caddie tip expected after round. Caddie service included in the all-in green fee package.

cart_fee_thb.note: Included in the all-in morning package rate of 2,100 THB.

address.value: 186 Moo 1, Chotana Road, Mae Sa, Mae Rim, Chiang Mai 50180, Thailand

latitude.note: Approximate — Mae Sa, Mae Rim. Needs map verification.

drive_time_from_bangkok_min.note: Chiang Mai is ~700km from Bangkok — visitors fly (1h10m BKK→CNX), drive not practical

prose.overview: Summit Green Valley Chiangmai Country Club is an 18-hole, par-72 championship course in the Mae Sa valley of Mae Rim district, approximately 20 kilometres and 20 minutes north of central Chiang Mai. Opened in 1990, it is one of the oldest golf courses in the Chiang Mai region and was designed by Dennis Griffiths — the same Australian architect responsible for the original Thai Country Club in Bangkok. The course occupies a lowland valley setting ringed by mountains, with hundreds of palm trees lining the fairways that give it a tropical-parkland character distinct from the higher-elevation forested courses further from the city. Summit Green Valley is a consistent fixture on Northern Thailand golf itineraries, valued for its reliable conditioning, manageable terrain, and all-in pricing that includes caddie and cart at one of the more accessible green fee levels among Chiang Mai's championship layouts.
prose.layout_and_experience:
Griffiths' design is primarily a water-and-bunker challenge over moderately undulating terrain. The valley setting keeps elevation changes gentle compared to the mountain courses, making the layout physically accessible while delivering strategic difficulty through well-placed bunkers and lake hazards that come into play on nearly every hole.

The fairways are broad but bunker positions from the tee demand precise alignment. The approach corridors narrow considerably around the greens on many of the par-4s, where bunkers and water margins give the hole its final test. The signature 9th hole — a 416-yard par 4 — requires a tee shot over water with sand traps in the landing area, followed by a second shot over water to an elevated island green: a double-water challenge that golfers often identify as the defining moment of the round.

At 7,202 yards, the course plays long from the back tees but the valley's flat character keeps distances manageable; most shots require standard club selection rather than the reduced-spin adjustments sometimes needed on hilly mountain layouts. The greens are medium-paced and receptive to well-struck approaches. Green fee packages include one caddie and cart per player — during peak season, two players may share one cart.
prose.tips: The morning all-in rate of 2,100 THB (including green fee, cart, and caddie) represents good value by Chiang Mai standards; the afternoon/night rate drops to 1,900 THB. A caddie tip of approximately 400 THB per round is customary and payable in cash to the caddie at the end of the round. Book early morning tee times in the November–March high season when the course is popular — the Mae Rim valley can be misty and atmospheric at dawn. During the hot season (March–May), morning rounds finish before the most intense heat; the Mae Sa valley also retains some humidity year-round. The course is approximately 20 minutes from Chiang Mai Airport by Grab taxi, making it convenient for arrival-day or departure-day rounds.
prose.location_and_access: Summit Green Valley Chiangmai Country Club is located in Mae Sa, Mae Rim district, approximately 20 kilometres north of Chiang Mai city centre and around 20 minutes from Chiang Mai International Airport (CNX). Visitors from Bangkok fly to CNX (approximately 1 hour 10 minutes from Suvarnabhumi or Don Mueang) — driving the 700 kilometres from Bangkok is not practical for a golf trip. The course is easily reached from Chiang Mai by Grab taxi or private car via Chotana Road (Route 107) north toward Mae Rim.
prose.rental_cta_context: Teeing off at Summit Green Valley Chiangmai Country Club on your Northern Thailand golf trip? Rent premium clubs in Bangkok — delivered to your hotel before you fly — so you can enjoy the palm-lined fairways without the burden of airline baggage fees.
